description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build with vcpkg that runs on push to master, tags matching v*, and specific paths, as well as on pull requests to those paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu, macos, windows) with different compilers (gcc, clang, msvc) and build types (Debug, Release) with optional LuaJIT support. For each matrix combination, it checks out the repository, installs CMake and vcpkg, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, builds with CMake, and uploads the resulting artifacts.
